sglang.title: [PD][Spec] Fix hidden state transfer for spec decode
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR is a supplement to #7242. The metadata buffer includes the loprobs and hidden state to support PD+logprobs and PD+spec decode, but the PR contributors haven't updated the send_aux function, and I found out that these newly added metadata are not properly sent along with the output

sglang.title: EPLB support for MTP
sglang.author: yilian49
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Modifications
Add a context manager feature to disable recorder, in order to support EPLB while using MTP. The disable feature is used in eagle_worker and deepseek_nextn
Command
SGLANG_DEEPEP_NUM_MAX_DISPATCH_TOKENS_PER_RANK=256 python3 -m sglang.launch_server 
--attention-backend fa3 
--model-path

sglang.title: fix: force synchronization between TP workers when update_weights
sglang.author: dangkai4u
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In VerlEngine, when TP0 worker in verl sends generate or update_weights_from_tensor requests to the scheduler, other TP workers are not blocked. This can lead to potential issues, such as inconsistent parameter updates (if loaded_weights is a temporary Tensor buffer that is frequently ove

sglang.title: [CPU] [BF16] Call fused_experts_cpu, weight_packed_linear and bmm_cpu kernel in DeepSeek model
sglang.author: chunyuan-w
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

When CPU has AMX support, replace moe_forward_native with fused_experts_cpu, replace F.linear and torch.matmul with weight_packed_linear, add AttnForwardMethod.MLA_FUSED_ROPE_CPU to optimize the performance.

sglang.title: feat: send kvmetrics from sglang scheduler
sglang.author: zixuanzhang226
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR introduces the first step toward integrating the Dynamo Planner with SGLANG. It enables the scheduler to send KV-related metrics—required by the planner to make scaling decisions for prefill/decode workers—via a ZeroMQ (ZMQ) socket.
Background:
Dynamo Planner is a service designed

sglang.title: [PD] Add different TP sizes support for no-MLA models
sglang.author: Hongbosherlock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Inspired by #5922, this PR add support for different TP sizes per DP rank for no-MLA models.
This enhancement aims to provide more flexibility in configuring PD setups.
In SGLang, the KV cache is managed in pages. When Prefill and Decode stages have differing TP sizes, the transfer of pag

Enable an option to run emulations when running NVFP4 on a non-b200 machine instead of falling back to always use marlin

vllm.title: static_scaled_fp8_quant should not run when scale.numel is not 1
vllm.author: eldarkurtic
vllm.bodyExcerpt: static_scaled_fp8_quant should not run when scale.numel() > 1. Right now, when scale is an array of values, static_scaled_fp8_quant will just use the first scale and ignore the rest of the array. This shouldn't happen silently, and probably best to fail and inform the user that scale must be of size

Purpose

Test Plan
vllm serve microsoft/Phi-3-mini-128k-instruct --seed 42 --disable-log-requests --gpu-memory-util

vllm.title: [P/D] Avoid stranding blocks in P when aborted in D's waiting queue
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We currently have an exposure in the nixl P/D disagg implementation whereby allocated blocks can easily be stranded on the P worker when requests are aborted.
Whether things are cleaned up properly depends on where the request is in its P/D lifecycle when the abort (client disconnect) occurs.

P ins

vllm.author: Chenyaaang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add TPU specific environment variable: VLLM_TPU_MOST_MODEL_LEN. This is used to pass in the request length for most of requests, comparing with the existing variablemax_model_len for the length of longest requests. This will benefit when most_model_len is much longer than most_model_len, and

vllm.title: [PD] Skip `tp_size` exchange with rank0
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up optimization to #18833 that I had previously discussed with @njhill .
Basically we can piggyback tp_size on the kv_connector metadata exchange, saving us one extra handshake with rank0 to get the tp_size.
